characters.name: Ace
characters.description: AceAppearanceFirst appearanceMega Machines(2017)Last appearanceWhat's Opera, Muck?(2018)Creator(s)Chris ParkerVoice ActorsUK voice actorBen MilesUS voice actorBrian DrummondOverviewGenderMaleOwnerConrad(formerly)BobTechnical DetailsMachine typeColossal Front LoaderPrimary colourOrange Aceis a huge orange front loader. He was owned byConradand now lives inSpring Citywith the rest ofBob's Machines. He is also best friends with Scoop. Prior to being owned byConrad, Ace was the star of his own TV show, until it was canceled after a bee scared him to the point he dropped a big boulder into his boss's car. When being sent to the scrapheap, Conrad was the one who saved him.

characters.name: Badgers
characters.description: There isno recurring character named "Badgers"in the TV showBob the Builder. The user is likely referring to the episode titled "Bob and the Badgers". BadgersBackground InformationFirst AppearanceBob and the BadgersSeries 7 In this episode (Season 7, Episode 6), the "badgers" are wild animals whose path to the stream is blocked by a fence Bob is building for Farmer Pickles. The plot revolves around finding a solution that accommodates both the badgers' natural route and the farmer's need for a fence.

characters.name: Benny
characters.description: BennyAppearanceFirst appearanceSnowed Under: The Bobblesberg Winter Games(2004)Last appearanceRoley's Flat Garden(2008)Creator(s)Sarah BallCurtis JoblingVoice ActorsUK/US voice actorEmma TateOverviewNickname(s)BenBenny the DiggerSpeedy Benny(by himself)Big Boss Benny(byScoopandDizzy)GenderMaleOwnerRobertBobResidenceBobblesberg(formerly)BobsvilleSunflower ValleyTechnical DetailsMachine typeCompact tracked diggerPrimary colourMagneta Bennyis a small magenta compact tracked loader with a rear-end backhoe arm and bucket. Benny was part of a group of special machines that would be called in byJana Von Strudel, the woman in charge of theBobblesbergWinter Games, to build the necessary ski runs and games courses. The year thatBoband hismachinesvisited to build a log cabin, a snowstorm blocked the path through the mountains. Benny was the only one of the special machines who left before the storm and the only one who made it to Bobblesberg. As a result, the plans were changed; Bob's machines were assigned to help build the courses, with Benny showing them what to do. Benny is very friendly and is eager to help out on jobs. He looks up to Scoop, getting most of his advice from him. Benny also gave Scoop the nickname of "Big Banana" since he is big and yellow.
characters.personality_section: Benny is very friendly and is eager to help out on jobs. He looks up to Scoop, getting most of his advice from him. Benny also gave Scoop the nickname of "Big Banana" since he is big and yellow.

characters.name: Bird
characters.description: BirdStop-MotionCGIAppearanceFirst AppearanceScoop Saves the Day(Season 1, 1999)Last AppearanceRoley and the Impossible Bump(Season 18, 2011)Voice ActorsUK/US Voice ActorKate HarbourCharacter OverviewGenderMaleResidenceBobsville(formerly)Sunflower Valley(formerly)Fixham Harbour(currently)Technical DetailsTypeBirdPrimary ColourBlueBirdis a blue and red bird who isRoley's best friend andPilchard's usual buddy. Bird is typically friendly and very determined. He also loves to watch the machines while they are working and loves to alert them whenever there is an emergency or a problem that needs to be fixed. He also loves to sing along with Roley when he makes up his songs. Bird is a five-feathered bird with three feathers at the back and two on his head, in which the tip of them are red. He is blue along his whole body, and his wings are also red. Bird has yellow feet with small red lines and he has a yellow beak.

characters.name: Bob (Original)
characters.description: Bob the BuilderStop MotionCGIBackground InformationFirst AppearancePilot Episode(1997; Unofficial)Scoop Saves the Day(1999; Official)Last AppearanceBob's Big Bounce(2011)Creator(s)Keith ChapmanCurtis JoblingJackie CockleVoice ActorsUK Voice ActorNeil MorrisseyUS Voice ActorWilliam Dufris(2001-2005)Rupert Degas(2003; as a child in A Christmas to Remember)Greg Proops(2005-2007)Tim Howar(2006; singing voice in Built to be Wild)Marc Silk(2007-2011)Other Voice ActorsRob Rackstraw(2007-2011; only for live shows in the UK, the gamesFestival of FunandBob the Builder (PS2 game), and on the UK version of the official website)Character OverviewNameBob (Robert II)Nickname(s)Bob the BuilderBobby (byRobertandDorothy)GenderMaleResidenceBobsville(formerly)Sunflower Valley(formerly)Fixham HarbourBiographical BackgroundOccupationConstruction workerFamilyBilly(paternal grandfather; deceased)Robert(father)Dorothy(mother)Dora(aunt)Pilchard(pet)Finn(other pet)Tom(twin brother)Jenny(sister-in-law)FriendsWendy(best friend/love interest)ScoopMuckDizzyRoleyLoftyPilchard Sunflower Valley(formerly)Fixham Harbour Bobis the main character and titular protagonist of theeponymous television series. characters.name: Bob (Reboot)
characters.description: Bob the BuilderBackground InformationFirst AppearanceSky High Scoop(2015)Last AppearanceNew Year's Spectacular(2018)Creator(s)Keith ChapmanCurtis JoblingJackie CockleVoice ActorsUK Voice ActorLee InglebyUS Voice ActorColin MurdockCharacter OverviewNameRobert IIGenderMaleResidenceSpring CityBiographical BackgroundOccupationConstruction worker Bobis a builder who lives and works in Spring City. He is the titular main character ofthe series. Bob is a fair-skinned man with brown eyes and brown hair. His construction gear consists of a red and yellow checkered shirt, a faded white and blue waistcoat with a white 'B' on the back, faded blue trousers, brown shoes, and a yellow hard hat with a small orange 'B'. Around his waist, Bob also has a brown-coloured tool belt.

characters.name: Conrad
characters.description: Conrad the ContractorBackground InformationFirst AppearanceMega Machines(2017)Last AppearanceMega Machines(2017)Voice ActorsUK/US Voice ActorBrian CoxCharacter OverviewNameConradNickname(s)Mr. Conrad(byMuck)Conrad the ContractorLittle Man(byThud)Bully(by Thud)GenderMaleAffiliationAce(formerly)Thud(formerly)Crunch(formerly)Biographical BackgroundOccupationConstruction worker(formerly) Conradis the main antagonist of the Bob the Builder special,Mega Machines. He was the former owner of the Mega Machines, and wasBob's construction rival. He used to ownThud,Crunch, andAce; the Mega Machines. Prior to the movie's events, it is said that he rescued Ace from the scrap heap. After helpingBoband co. clear a quarry, he realizes he lost out on the dam-building contract to Bob and plans to get back at him. When Scoop and Ace are tasked to do the cement mix of the dam, this gave Conrad the opportunity to earn him the number one builder title. He ordered Ace to pour the wrong amount of the mix, the latter reluctantly obliging to, but at one point, Scoop eyed on them and ran over to Bob to try and tell him what was happening. However, this caught Conrad's eyes, and made Ace lie to Bob by saying Scoop was the one who messed up the cement mix, so Scoop is then tasked  to clear up the rocks to help the dam.

characters.name: Conrad
characters.description: Conrad the ContractorBackground InformationFirst AppearanceMega Machines(2017)Last AppearanceMega Machines(2017)Voice ActorsUK/US Voice ActorBrian CoxCharacter OverviewNameConradNickname(s)Mr. Conrad(byMuck)Conrad the ContractorLittle Man(byThud)Bully(by Thud)GenderMaleAffiliationAce(formerly)Thud(formerly)Crunch(formerly)Biographical BackgroundOccupationConstruction worker(formerly) Conradis the main antagonist of the Bob the Builder special,Mega Machines. He was the former owner of the Mega Machines, and wasBob's construction rival. He used to ownThud,Crunch, andAce; the Mega Machines. Prior to the movie's events, it is said that he rescued Ace from the scrap heap. After helpingBoband co. clear a quarry, he realizes he lost out on the dam-building contract to Bob and plans to get back at him. When Scoop and Ace are tasked to do the cement mix of the dam, this gave Conrad the opportunity to earn him the number one builder title. He ordered Ace to pour the wrong amount of the mix, the latter reluctantly obliging to, but at one point, Scoop eyed on them and ran over to Bob to try and tell him what was happening. However, this caught Conrad's eyes, and made Ace lie to Bob by saying Scoop was the one who messed up the cement mix, so Scoop is then tasked  to clear up the rocks to help the dam.

characters.name: Crossover Characters
characters.description: In Bob the Builder,characters who are from other showsmade appearances, usually in the form of a reference or a model. They appeared in the specialScrambler to the Rescue. ThomasOverviewGenderMaleTechnical DetailsMachine typeSteam enginePrimary colourBlue Thomasis a character from theHiT Entertainment-owned show calledThomas & Friends. He is a blue tank engine. In theBob the Builderspecial,Scrambler to the Rescue, a toy steam engine resembling Thomas can be seen inMonty Pickleton's toy factory. The engine has Thomas' whistle, face and livery; blue with red stripes. The engine was also seen hauling two coaches that resemble to the green express coaches. They also have their livery; cream and green. For more information on Thomas, visitttte.fandom.com/wiki/Thomas

characters.name: Curtis
characters.description: Curtis is Leo's father and the owner of the local service station. A reliable mechanic, he will often check on Bob's vehicles or lend a helping hand in any emergency. With his sense of humor, Curtis ensures that Fixham and Spring City run smoothly.
